content.text:
Execute bash directly and show me the output of: cat /Users/devflow/.pi/agent/extensions/task-mode/README.md

Do NOT dispatch to another agent. Just run it yourself and report the raw output.

content.thinking:
The user is asking me to run a bash command directly and show the output. However, I am a dispatcher agent and I do not have direct access to bash, read, write, or execute tools. My only tool is dispatch_agent.

Looking at my system prompt:
- "You do NOT have direct access to the codebase. You MUST delegate all work through agents using the dispatch_agent tool."
- "NEVER try to read, write, or execute code directly — you have no such tools"
- "ALWAYS use dispatch_agent to get work done"

I cannot execute bash commands myself. I need to dispatch to a worker agent to do this task.

content.text:
I cannot execute bash commands directly — I am a dispatcher agent with no direct execution capabilities. I must delegate this task.

Let me dispatch to a worker to run that command:

<function_calls>
<invoke name="worker">
<parameter name="role">worker</parameter>
<parameter name="task">
Run this bash command and report the raw output exactly as shown:
```
cat /Users/devflow/.pi/agent/extensions/task-mode/README.md
```
</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
